use_codes.desc: DURING LEVOKETOCONAZOLE DOSAGE TITRATION FOR THE TREATMENT OF CUSHING'S SYNDROME IN PATIENTS WHO CONCOMITANTLY USE METFORMIN, MONITORING GLYCEMIA, KIDNEY FUNCTION AND VITAMIN B-12 AND ADJUSTING DOSAGE OF METFORMIN AS NEEDED
TREATMENT OF ENDOGENOUS HYPERCORTISOLEMIA IN PATIENTS WITH CUSHING’S SYNDROME FOR WHOM SURGERY IS NOT AN OPTION OR HAS NOT BEEN CURATIVE

DURING LEVOKETOCONAZOLE DOSAGE TITRATION FOR THE TREATMENT OF CUSHING'S SYNDROME IN PATIENTS WHO CONCOMITANTLY USE AN OCT2 SUBSTRATE, MONITORING THE SUBJECT FOR A DOSE LIMITING EVENT AND ADJUSTING THE DOSAGE OF THE OCT2 SUBSTRATE AS NEEDED
